caption: A man with a distinctive high, greyish-white hairstyle wears black headphones, glasses, a white button-down shirt, yellow suspenders, and a red bow tie. He sits in a studio setting with a black microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, a woman with pink hair wearing a green dress is partially visible, along with a wall featuring a logo that says "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed picture of a man. The man speaks into the microphone, gesturing with his left hand as he talks. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and another on the right says "BOSS TALK 101". As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak, shifting his head slightly and moving his hand to emphasize his points.
